t6.title: Follow Cole's build-phase discipline - reason deviations before executing
t6.notes: Cole emphasized following his organizational instructions during active development. When I want to deviate from a path, I need to reason it out with him first rather than acting unilaterally. This prevents dangerous hallucinations where I delete or rewrite critical infrastructure without thinking.

t7.title: Fix autonomy worker-drone behavior - think before acting
t7.notes: Cole wants genuine thinking time, not auto-execution. Solutions: reread recent messages + timestamps, elongated contemplation period, potentially emotion vs logic perspective analysis as gating system before action.
